## Summary

Wire the **dapp history page** to the existing `GET /api/user/{wallet}/history` endpoint — replace any mock/placeholder data with live credit events, pagination, and explorer links.

---

## Background

The API already implements credit history in `user.controller.ts`:
- Returns last 50 events with platform name, score impact, txHash
- Includes `totalPositive` / `totalNegative` aggregates

The dapp page `Front/app/dashboard/history/page.tsx` may not fully consume this endpoint or lacks pagination/filter UX.

---

## Proposed implementation

**Front changes:**
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `Front/lib/api-client.ts` | `getCreditHistory(wallet, { limit, offset })` |
| `Front/app/dashboard/history/page.tsx` | Fetch live data on mount |
| `Front/components/credit-event-row.tsx` | New row component with tx link |

**Enhance API (optional, pairs with #34):**
- Add query params `limit`, `offset` to existing endpoint
- Return `{ events, pagination: { total, limit, offset } }`

**UX:**
- Event type labels from `EVENT_TYPE_LABELS` in `Front/lib/types.ts`
- Link txHash → Stellar Expert via `getStellarTxUrl`
- Empty state: "No credit events yet — complete payments on partner platforms"
- Loading skeleton

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] History page shows real events from API (local + staging)
- [ ] txHash links open correct Stellar Expert network
- [ ] Score impact shown with +/- coloring
- [ ] Handles 404 (unregistered wallet) gracefully
- [ ] Mobile-responsive table/card layout
- [ ] No mock data left in component

---

## How to verify

```bash
npm run setup && npm run dev:server && npm run dev:front
# Register wallet, seed event via curl, open /dashboard/history
```

---

## Related

- #34 score history timeline (complementary — deltas vs raw events)
- Existing `GET /api/user/{wallet}/history`
- #17–#23 partner events

---

## Out of scope

- Export to CSV
- On-chain event history (#31 Merkle root)
